transcript.text:
Why are you giving this to Ms. Tzuyang!?
Are you out of your mind!?
I'm going to call and make an order
[That moment]
We got an order
I ordered 3 chickens
Eating 3 chickens for a light meal!?
I think I order too much considering they were free
She will not be able to eat our food
I'm going to eat it and give an honest review
This..
[Yoo Jae Suk and Park Myung Soo's Fried Chicken Mukbang START]
[GRAND OPENING: Free Fried Chicken]
Hello everyone
I'm going to order some chicken and give an honest review
[They are watching her live show] She does mukbang

It's Tzuyang
Right?
Is this on live?
[She has no idea who made it]
That's big
That's our chicken
It's a good size
Why are you giving this to Ms. Tzuyang!?
Are you out of your mind?!
Does she do mukbang?
She's a very famous mukbanger
The pickled radish brands are different
What happened?
[They only fried the chicken, accidentally gave 2 different brands of pickled radish]
Where's the salt?
They didn't give me any salt

That's unacceptable
[Big mistake]
Thank you for 300 star balloons (AfreecaTV donations)
300 what?
Water balloons?
Not water balloons, Star Balloons
Why would she get water balloons?
Stop embarrassing me
[Viewers: Where is that chicken from? What brand is it?]
How is it?
Tbh
I wasn't expecting much
The leg meat is very tender and it's seasoned well
[Jae Suk fried the original and Myung Soo did the sweet & spicy]
Really?
Are you sure this is the right one?

Look at that
That's amazing
I see why people watch mukbang now
It's really not bad at all
She likes the seasoning on it
She eats 3 chickens?
Pretty sure she can eat like 10
Amazing..
She won't be able to eat our chicken
The sauce is very important for sweet & spicy chicken
This is fun
Did you see how she de-boned it?
That's all technique She's a professional
Do you guys know the old spicy chicken sauce?
The very old/traditional one
Well, because old people made it

It's like that plus some homemade sauce
She's exactly right!
But when you make the sauce at home, it can get a bit dry
If there's too much gochujang sauce (red chili pepper paste)
So precise
I told you You put too much gochujang sauce
Look, she's going back to the original chicken
[Can't deny it]
Ms. Tzuyang is
Ms. Tzuyang is so nice
She is a very nice person
But this is very well-made
Well, it's because you can't keep eating the same flavor
So she's going back and forth
This is a bit..
Sour too

There's a strong garlic taste
And it's too sweet
But she's really enjoying our chicken
Tzuyu is amazing
It's not Tzuyu, it's Tzuyang
Tzuyu is in Twice
This is Tzuyang!
You should've said so from the start
If I had to choose 1 from the original and the sweet & spicy,
The original tastes a tad bit better
But they're both okay
The chat is asking her why she is so hesitant about the food review today
It's because our chicken tastes bad
The batter is too thick
I mean, it's not too thick so it's fine I guess
It's not bad, it's good It's fine

All chicken dishes taste good, no?
There is definitely room for improvement
I wish they used a paper wrap for these
The batter is seasoned just right
But this one is a bit..
A bit
Well, it's difficult to eat more
Ms. Tzuyang, we made those
She will be shocked after seeing this video
I'm not eating the bones It's just very crispy
It's like those chicken that gets crispier if you drain the grease out
So these are still very crispy even if some time already passed
Is she not full yet?
How is she eating all of this? That's quite impressive
It looks like she can't eat it all, right?
She will finish everything

I think the food got cold while getting delivered, sadly
If you want to taste the true flavor of the chicken,
You'd have to eat it right away after coming out of the fryer
How is she still continuing to eat?
I'm starting to get worried
She's so precious when she eats
That is exactly why people watch her mukbang shows
This is just a gochujang flavored sauce
What's funny is that
I've never seen chicken places that do not give enough sauce on the bottom
There's no sauce on the bottom
[Viewers: Why are you only eating 3 chickens? Are you on a diet?]
I'd feel bad for eating a lot
See? Everyone's saying 3 chickens are not enough for her
Really?
One can't possibly resist the temptation when watching her eat

My mouth is full of salt
I can't watch this anymore
We're sorry, Ms. Tzuyang
It was okay, but it's because I'm eating 3 servings
So the saltiness just builds up over time
[But the chicken was still tasty]
One last piece!
[Cleared 3 chickens]
She has no idea we made that chicken
Let's make a video message for her
Let's put this here
[Sending her a video message]
I just received a video message from the people that made this chicken
I'm going to watch it
Owners, I'm sorry!
Hello Ms. Tzuyang, This is Yoo Jae Suk & Park Myung Soo

Long story short, I made the original fried chicken
And I made the sweet & spicy
Your reviews were on point
I didn't know much I made the batter way too thick
It was my first time too, I made the sauce from home
You're getting a lot of flavors, right?
What you said was exactly right No no no, it was delicious
It was tasty
I would often watch your mukbang videos
But I had no idea you would be doing a mukbang with our chicken
And also, it will be hard for you to believe, but
I learned how to fry chicken today
I'm sorry
No, no, no, it was great
It was good!
What hurt me the most was that

our chicken might have tasted so bad for you to eat
I know that you weren't satisfied with it, but you ate it so deliciously regardless
I want to thank you for that I will subscribe
But really,
We are cheering you on from here
As you do mukbangs and enjoy what you do,
I'm sure you're healthy, but please take care of your health as you entertain others with your show
We will go away now
If given the chance, we will do our best to serve you again
If we happen to make chicken again,
we will make sure to learn the best recipe
and serve you properly
We really had no idea you would be eating today's chicken
But next time, we will do better
Thank you and goodbye
I was surprised
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com]
